since_last: 38% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.47%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.04% · BTC +2.79% · Gold +1.74% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 38% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.47%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.47%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +12.18%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +12.18%, RXRX +4.63%, AAPL +4.08%, ISRG +3.96%, ADBE +3.39%. Laggards: TER -9.98%, KLAC -9.14%, AMAT -7.76%, CEVA -7.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.45% at $158.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
